response.overview: Girls love surprises. Gifts, flowers, romantic walks. The main character of the film, Sasha, is very surprised to find nothing of the kind in her own life. Her life is an utter irony. She works at a travel agency but is afraid of flying. Everyday she sees many happy couples but is lonely herself. She has a boyfriend but he is a travel photographer. Which she says is almost a verdict. As he is constantly on the move. She is turning thirty. But Sasha does not lose hope.
response.title: Shla Sasha po shosse
